chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Criminal Bail Application No.S-944 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 07.10.2024 Applicant is present on bail. Mr. Ayaz Ali Gopang, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Rameshan Oad, Assistant Prosecutor General, Sindh along-with SIP/SHO Zeeshan Ali PS Old Hala. == Applicant Pir Syed Aftab Shah Jillani seeks pre-arrest bail in FIR No.11 of 2023 registered under sections 324, 147, 148, 149, 114, 504 and 337-H(ii) P.P.C at PS Hala Old after his earlier bail for same relief was declined by the learned Additional Sessions Judge, Hala vide impugned order dated 23.08.2023, hence this bail application. The facts relating to bail application in hand are already mentioned in FIR as well as memo, therefore, there is no need to reproduce the same. The bail application has been sought on the ground that trial has been concluded including the statement of accused and the case is fixed before the learned Trial Court for final arguments. Learned APG states that since the trial has been concluded, as such, bail application may be disposed of. Heard learned counsel for the respective parties and perused the material available on record. Since the trial of main case has been concluded including recording of statement of accused and now the case is fixed for final arguments, as such, to keep this bail application for indefinite period would not serve any purpose and any observations on merits may prejudice either party. Consequently, interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 28.08.2023 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions.

Since the trial of main case has been concluded including recording of statement of accused and now the case is fixed for final arguments, as such, to keep this bail application for indefinite period would not serve any purpose and any observations on merits may prejudice either party. Consequently, interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant vide order dated 28.08.2023 is confirmed on the same terms and conditions. Needless to mention that above observations are tentative in nature only to decide instant bail application and same would not prejudice case of either party at trial. Instant Criminal Bail Application is disposed of in above terms. JUDGE Muhammad Danish *
